findings:
---
finding_type: audience_insight
summary: Founders skim pricing pages and miss how buyers compare tiers
source_ids: src_01
confidence: medium
evidence_note: Good enough to keep the script practical
---

claims:
---
claim_type: proof_point
claim: Anchoring affects perceived value before full feature evaluation
source_ids: src_02
confidence: medium
mechanism: The first visible comparison changes what feels expensive
---

uncertainty_flags:
---
flag_type: verification_required
claim: Any statement about exact conversion lift
reason: Search coverage was thin and did not establish a numeric effect
severity: medium
source_ids: src_02
---

research_stop_reason: Search coverage was thin, so keep the script qualitative
